reviews.review_description: I had been looking at VR cameras for quite some time. They are expensive, but I very much want to interview my older relatives in a 3-D format while I still can. When this app came along, it was a no-brainer solution. It’s easy to use, uploads the videos easily, and is very reasonably priced. Thank you to the developers!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words and support. It really means a lot.

I am very happy to hear that Spatial Camera can help you capture these important memories with your family in 3D. That is exactly the kind of use case that makes building this app feel meaningful.

If you ever have any questions, feedback, or ideas, please feel free to reach out. Also, if you would like to follow updates and join the community, you can join the Discord here:
https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw

reviews.review_description: It is a great app because it lets you use both cameras to record 3d SBS videos. However the only issue is the the ipd seems very crushed and all the videos recorded seems to be closed to the eyes. The viewport seems good but after playing the recorded video it gets difficult to focus. And also it really needs more stabilization. This app has great potential I believe.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for the feedback, I really appreciate it.

I’m constantly working on fixes and improvements for the app. The app is still improving step by step, so feedback like this helps a lot.

You’re also welcome to join the Discord and share any questions, suggestions, or examples there:
https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw

Thanks again!

reviews.review_description: I think the app should allow recording in the highest resolution the cameras are capable of. I expected more for an app I paid quite a bit for. I didn't see a version where I could try it out first. I had a free app that did almost as good a job. I think the developers should offer more resolution. Or explain why you can't.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback.

Spatial Camera already uses the highest resolution that the Quest hardware and system driver provide. The app does not limit resolution and exposes all available camera modes from the device.

On Quest, camera access is controlled by the system driver. If higher resolutions become available through updates, the app will support them automatically.

reviews.review_title: Great app, just needs a half SBS option
reviews.review_description:
Hey there, great job! Any chance of a native half SBS option? Currently converting the full SBS to half SBS for (Real 3D) 3DTV playback is a bit of a pain...

Update to inc quick dev response: That's great to know, thanks for responding so quickly - will indeed join discord. Would be great to have both FSBS and HSBS generated, so a copy to stay on device and share etc and another to move off etc for 3DTV viewing. Cheers!

developer_response.body:
Hi,

Thank you very much for the feedback.

Yes, this is already in my pipeline. I am planning to add a dropdown in Settings where you will be able to choose between Full SBS and Half SBS output.

So this should be available in a future release.

Thanks again, and if you would like to follow updates or share more feedback, you can join our Discord here:

https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw

reviews.review_description:
This is a GREAT APP for the price, can't wait to learn more about what all will do, unfortunately,  having to relearn the Navigator took up most of my time today, but look forward to using this more often, and getting used to everything associated with it.
And loved that you don't have to emphasize what you want in 3D , other than just adjust the color to my liking. IM LOVING THIS!!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for the great review!

I am really happy to hear that you are enjoying the 3D effect and the app overall. I will keep improving Spatial Camera and making it easier to use with future updates.

I noticed you rated the app 4 out of 5. If there is anything specific I could improve to make it a 5 star experience for you, I would really appreciate your feedback.

If you have any questions, feedback, or want to follow new updates, you can join our Discord here:

https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw

reviews.review_description: A huge high five to the developer for taking the initiative and getting this app into the wild. We've been long overdue for something like this that addresses yet another feature and functionality of the Q3. It's not perfect - I'm going with 4 stars for now but can envision the passion of the developer and community driving the rating up closer to 5 stars in no time. There are so many potential applications around this. Think of the opportunities in capturing memories, addressing healthy ageing and cognitive maintenance. Wonderful.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind words and the 4 star review, I really appreciate it.

I’m a solo developer and feedback like this truly helps.

If you’d like, please join our Discord. We can chat about ideas and improvements there, and I’ll do my best to make the app better and hopefully worthy of 5 stars soon:
https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw

Thanks again for the support!

reviews.review_description: The Kinemaster video editor converts media into 4K, why can't this app not able to do 4K conversion?

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your question.

Spatial Camera captures real data directly from the headset cameras using the device driver, so the resolution you get is the actual RAW camera output. There is no AI upscaling or artificial 4K conversion applied.

If you would like to discuss this more or suggest features, feel free to join our Discord
https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw

reviews.review_description:
The direct upload to YouTube is perfect! I'm not sure if it's technically possible, but it would be much better if the frame rate was higher (60fps?). Also, I haven't tried it yet, but I'm going to set the video to 30mbps! It's awesome! Well done!

Here are my suggestions:

1. Export to Google Drive (or other Cloud services).
2. Apple spatial video conversion (the original is obviously SBS).
3. Slightly better UI and improved icons.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for the awesome review and the great suggestions, I really appreciate it.
About 60fps, unfortunately 30fps is a hardware limitation on Quest, so higher frame rates are not possible at the moment.
If you’d like, please join our Discord where we can discuss ideas and feedback, and where I share all new updates and ongoing work:

https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw

Thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_title: Transform your Quest in a 3D camera
reviews.review_description:
I used to fiddle with settings to film in 3D but the result was a weird square 3D-video. But this app does the job a lot better, creates a video in a normal videoresolution in nice 3D. If you ever wanted to make 3D videos but don't have the budget to buy those expensive 3D camera's (or just want to make a few gadgetvideos for fun) this is a steal. 

The only downpart is that when you move your head, the camera moves with it. If you don't want people to become seasick, hold your head still when you film. And choose scenes where the 3D adds to the video, for instance people skateboarding and coming straight at you, or cars passing by, any spectacular action where things happen around you. 

I love it, this proves that the Quest can do a lot more than just games, it's a wonderfull tool and this app uses it's potential to the max.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for the detailed review and kind words! I really appreciate it 😊
I noticed the 4 star rating and I would love to hear your thoughts on how we can improve the app even more.

If you would like, please join our Discord and share your ideas with us. I am very open to suggestions and discussions with the community:
https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw

Thanks again for the support and for believing in the potential of Quest beyond games!

reviews.review_title: 3D Photos and Videos for VR Users
reviews.review_description: I absolutely LOVE this app. I like the idea that apps like this allows people to use their Quest headsets as tools to CREATE 3D content, as opposed to just using the headset to experience 3D content. It’s also fantastic for Quest users who want to do some 3D photography and 3D videography but don’t have the extra cash to buy a 3D camera. I highly recommend it!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your wonderful review. It really means a lot to me that you enjoy the app and use it to create 3D content. I noticed the four star rating and would love to hear if there is anything you think could make the experience even better. Your feedback helps me improve the app for everyone. If you want to share ideas or chat with the community, feel free to join our Discord. I am always there and happy to talk.
https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw

reviews.review_description: I've been looking for an app like this for years (and I'm kind of surprised that Meta doesn't include this in their stock OS).  I wish Meta would promote this app because I suspect that a lot of people aren't aware of its existence). It's instant, effective and the ability to export 3D videos to YouTube is fantastic.   I've not been able to capture 3D photos or video since my Nintendo 3DS.  This is a joy!   I do wish that the Quest 3 cameras were of a higher resolution and that the Quest could be used in sunlight - but those are simply hardware limitations.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the detailed and kind review! I’m really glad the app is useful for you and that the YouTube 3D export works well.

You’re absolutely right about the camera resolution and sunlight limitations — those are hardware limits of the Quest, but I’m continuing to improve things on the software side. More updates and new features are coming soon.

If you’d like to stay updated or share feedback, feel free to join our Discord community:
https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw

Thanks again for the support!

reviews.review_description: Being able to record videos and upload them to YouTube directly from the same device is incredibly convenient! These videos will definitely become precious memories. It would be even better if the app could support direct YouTube uploads in the future. The developer updates the app frequently, and I’m really glad I bought it. Highly recommended!

developer_response.body:
UPDATE:
Check the new release (version 0.2.3), with direct upload to YouTube.
Thank you so much for the kind words and support 🙏
I am really happy that you are enjoying the app.

Direct YouTube upload is already implemented and ready. It is currently waiting for Google and YouTube verification. As soon as the verification is approved, the feature will be released.

Thank you again for the recommendation and for supporting the app’s development.

reviews.review_description: When I first entered this world of Immersive Entertainment, I got a hunger to become a creator.  I started doing web searches on finding some inexpensive equipment to create this new type of content.  The Search is Over.  It only cost me $9.99 US Currency.  My Meta Quest is not only an immersive gaming system.  My Meta Quest is not only an immersive Entertainment System.  My Meta Quest is now a 3D Camera and more importantly, a 3D Video Camera.  Quality, Smality-We are talking about unlocking a feature that only costs 10 bucks, and also allows you to be 3D Content creator.  To the Develops of the app, I extend a thank you.  Dear Mark Zuckerberger... Thank you for taking this technology and spending the time to better develop it.    To the readings of this post....  Spend your money, and thank me later.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! Your words mean a lot to us and inspire us to keep improving the app. We hope you capture many great memories in 3D!

reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developer for this fun 3D camera app,
 I enjoyed it very much.  

My suggestion is to allow both import and export functions 
of photos and videos between the built-in viewer and the native gallery

 if possible, because the import photo or video into the built-in 3D viewer 
is a really useful and important function to have within this great camera app.  

Or allow the built-in 3D viewer to view directly from 
the native gallery if possible, 
because this is great and easy way to implement.

Please add this import function in the built-in 3D viewer 
and thank you very much.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your kind review and for helping to improve the app.
The app is mainly designed as a 3D camera, so we are not planning to add an import function from the gallery. However, there is already an option that lets you export your 3D photos and videos to the native gallery. There is a small bug with it right now, but we are preparing a new update that will be released in the upcoming days. This update will automatically save photos and videos in the native gallery in the correct 3D format, so you can easily view them there in 3D.

You can also join our Discord community to stay updated and discuss future features:
https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw

With the upcoming update, we are also adding several new functions to make the app even better.

reviews.review_description:
Great for making 3D photos and videos. Didn't experience any crashes worked as intended on Quest 3, it doesn't record sound except your own voice but that's due to the quests mic not the software, i plan to try it with an external mic later.

Tested w/ external mic and works perfectly 👌 It is odd hearing the person in front of you and also hearing them in the headset at the same time, they should add a mute audio output option (I know i can just turn down my volume but this would be more convenient)

Loving this app!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review. We are now working on a new update that will increase quality and add major new features to help capture more satisfying and comfortable stereoscopic videos and photos. This update is in the testing stage and will be released in the upcoming days. Please join our Discord for updates, discussions, and recommendations. We would be really grateful to hear your test results with the external microphone.
https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw

reviews.review_description: Create product! Works really great. Now it supports Youtube. That would make your Quest an instand 3D camera! Been experimenting with it, and results are amazing! 5 Stars!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing review and the 5 stars! I’m really glad you’re enjoying the results and the new YouTube support. More new features and improvements are coming soon.

If you’d like to stay updated and share feedback, please join our Discord community:
https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw

Thanks again for the support!

reviews.review_description: Awesome

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your awesome review. New amazing features are coming soon. Please join our Discord to stay updated and share your ideas so we can think about adding them to the app. Thanks again.
https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw

reviews.review_description: Have a Quest 3 with version 81. When I take photos and video I just get a black screen.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review and for letting us know about this issue. Can you please tell if the black photos appear inside the app gallery or in the native gallery? It will help us fix it faster. You can also join our Discord and share more details, we will be happy to help you there.
https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw

reviews.review_description: Great 3D that is limited by rhe quality of the Quest camera

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review. Version 0.2.0 will be much better with new functionality and quality improvements, and it will be released in the upcoming days. We are also doing research to enhance capture quality with AI, but that part is still in the research phase. Please join our Discord to stay updated and share your thoughts.
https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw

reviews.review_description: The app starts but taking a photo or a video crashes it instantly.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback and sorry for the crashes. We are working on a new update with general improvements, but the information you gave is a bit limited. Please join our Discord and share your Quest model and OS version so we can better understand and fix this problem. There is also a known bug related to the Meta OS that we are trying to avoid.

https://discord.gg/wDVr6SZgUw
